page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 32 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The server includes a bundled 7679 GB local SSD storage array and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps, operating under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core processing, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25% tier, with single-threaded gzip compression rated in the bottom 10%. Conversely, multi-core performance, including multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Passmark CPU tests, consistently reaches average mid-tier levels. Memory read bandwidth is measured at 1308.77 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 77.33 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, though the overall Passmark memory score remains in the lower 25% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers high resource density by combining a substantial 256.0 GB memory footprint with a massive 7.6 TB local SSD storage capacity. This hardware profile is optimized for storage-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis deployments, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing, where local storage speed and memory capacity outweigh the need for high single-core CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 7679 GB local SSD. Operating under a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU and memory performance, but average multi-core capabilities, with a Passmark CPU score of 23133.52 and a Redis throughput of 23.13 million operations per second. The server's high storage capacity and 1:8 memory-to-vCPU ratio make it qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. It is best suited for database hosting, caching layers, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks that benefit from large local SSD storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a bundled 7679 GB local SSD, optimized for storage-intensive and database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 7679 GB local SSD for database and storage workloads.
tagline: A storage-dense server featuring a massive local SSD array and balanced multi-core performance for memory-intensive database workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM.
Bundled 7679 GB local SSD storage for high-capacity local data access.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor.
Average multi-core performance balanced by lower single-core efficiency.
Well-suited for database hosting, Redis caching, and static web serving.
